nasb.text: So she went and did according to the word of Elijah, and she and he and her household ate for many days.

esv.text: And she went and did as Elijah said. And she and he and her household ate for many days.

cnv.text: 她就去照著以利亞所說的作了。她和以利亞，以及她的家人，吃了許多日子。

ccb.text: 那妇人就依照以利亚的话做了。妇人一家和以利亚就这样吃了许多天，
